notes:
v2.1.1 Bug Fixes
🐛 Fixed group chat name being empty when creating a new group.
🐛 Fixed group deletion notification using hardcoded Korean instead of localized text.
🐛 Fixed crack/repair toast showing the opposite message.

announcement.title: 📱 Smartphone Widget v2.1.1
announcement.content:
v2.1.1 — Bug Fixes

  • Fixed group chat name being empty on creation.
  • Fixed group deletion notification not being localized.
  • Fixed crack/repair toast showing the wrong message.

🐦 New Add-on: Chirp App! A Twitter-style SNS app for the Smartphone Widget. Check it out on the module page!
